title: nasturtium × neogradense
intro: Nasturtium × neogradense, a hybrid species of nasturtium, is a flowering plant characterized by its bright flowers and edible leaves and stems, which are often used as a garnish in salads. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The leaves and stems of nasturtium × neogradense have been used to treat conditions such as sore throats, wounds, and skin irritations due to their health benefits, including its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, have been used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
